reviews.comment:

It was really annoying that they wouldn't let me fully charge my phone, even though I had filled up with fuel on the way there and back.

reviews.comment:
No me gusto para nada la atención dentro de la cafetería sin ganas de atender y los precios de las cosas están más que dolarizados gente es Villa Langostura no Suiza cuiden el turismo después de tanta pandemia mira que recorri ypf desde la Quiaca a Ushuaia los precios de este lugar por las nubes. Y encima para cargar combustible va la aplicación para tomar algo no.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service inside the cafeteria at all. There was no desire to serve anyone, and the prices were beyond dollarized. People are in Villa Langostura, not Switzerland. Take care of tourism after so much pandemic. Look, I traveled from La Quiaca to Ushuaia to YPF, and the prices here are sky-high. And on top of that, to fill up on gas, you don't need the app to get something to drink.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtanVMM3ZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños impecables! Recomendable para pasar a cargar nafta y de paso tomarte un cafecito. Hay máquina para agua de termo (30 pesos la ficha) y tambien al lado está el restaurante de la estación. Nosotros llegamos después de las 15 así que no pudimos comer. Pero en general está buena.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were spotless! Highly recommended for filling up with gas and grabbing a coffee while you're at it. There's a machine for thermos water (30 pesos per token) and the station restaurant is right next door. We arrived after 3 PM, so we couldn't eat. But overall, it's good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtNHZuT21RRRAB
